name: authetrack
description: Behavioral fraud detection platform with real-time analytics

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "CLIENT,SERVER,ML" --prefix-colors "blue,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix ml-service"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && cd ml-service && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server
scripts.start: concurrently --names "SERVER,ML" --prefix-colors "magenta,yellow" "npm start --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix ml-service"
